# keyValueStore

**Instance Property**

An object that persists data on a page between multiple sessions.

## Declaration

```swift
var keyValueStore: PlaygroundKeyValueStore { get }
```

## Inspecting Page Data

- **text**: The current contents of the playground page, including any user-entered text.
